caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and white headphones sits in a room with light-colored wood paneling. He is wearing a dark blue t-shirt and a gold bracelet on his left wrist. Behind him is a Christmas tree decorated with colorful blue, red, and green lights, and a large screen displaying a blue interface with the number "20" repeated in several white boxes. As the sequence progresses, the man is initially seen smiling and gesturing with his left hand near his chin. He then shifts his expression into a wide, joyful laugh and raises his right arm high in the air in a celebratory gesture. His arm remains raised as he continues to laugh throughout the final frames, maintaining a jubilant expression while sitting in front of the gaming monitor and the festive tree.
